role: human final adjudication (process amendment — see note)
note: The roadmap specified double-blind human + independent-model per-assertion scoring. The user could not judge faithfulness cold and asked for assistance, so the process was amended and is recorded honestly: rater A = three blind claude-opus-4-8 subagents (scores-model.json), rater B = claude-fable-5 scoring independently before reading rater A's output (scores-fable.json), and the human ruled ONLY on the inter-rater disagreements, with both raters' reasonings presented side by side. Both raters are model-family-independent of the gpt-5.5 generator.

disagreements.raterA: faithful — 'flow into one another' is reciprocal across all three zones, licensing kitchen↔living
disagreements.raterB: unfaithful — a kitchen–dining–living chain also satisfies 'flow into one another'; the direct kitchen↔living edge over-asserts

disagreements.raterA: faithful — enumerable rooms are 2 bedrooms + hall + bathroom = exactly 4
disagreements.raterB: unfaithful — 'a run of rooms across the top' in a flat implies at least a living/kitchen space beyond the two bedrooms; exact 4 is an undercount

agreedUnfaithful.reason: rooms == 2 not brief-enumerable ('generous rooms' plural off the hall)
